headline: Altria’s on! PLUS Fast Track Launch Tests Smoke Free Growth Story
summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) is rolling out its on! PLUS nicotine pouches nationwide as part of a U.S. retail launch. The product is the first to be authorized under the FDA's new fast track pilot program for certain nicotine products. This marks a new step for Altria in its effort to expand beyond traditional cigarettes into oral nicotine products. For investors following NYSE:MO, this move sits at the intersection of regulation and product mix. Altria has long been associated with cigarettes,...
